cases.label: HTS compact high-field (METHOD-ONLY PROCESS parity anchor)

provenance.process_reference_reason: No licensed PROCESS MFILE / OUT.DAT extract is checked into this repository. Numeric PROCESS KPIs intentionally omitted (METHOD-ONLY honesty).

honesty.statement: This corpus ships METHOD-ONLY honesty: SHAMS PointInputs and delta dossiers are recorded, but PROCESS MFILE/OUT.DAT numeric KPIs are intentionally null until a lab contributes a licensed, provenance-tagged extract. Do not invent PROCESS reference numbers.
honesty.upgrade_path: To promote a case to NUMERIC: (1) add provenance.process_reference_source (repo path or citation + checksum), (2) fill process_reference with real PROCESS KPIs only, (3) set dossier_status=NUMERIC, (4) run refresh_corpus_hashes and re-verify.

notes: Independence Phase 1.3 — PROCESS parity corpus. METHOD-ONLY is a valid Phase-1 gate when no real PROCESS reference is available in-repo. Harness: src/parity_harness/process_corpus.py
